meaning: adj.钱币的,奖章的,钱币学的
examples: Numismatic evidence of the advances made by smelting technology in ancient India.
The author also put forward eight pieces of suggestion on how to administrate the numismatic market …
The author investigates the numismatic market, and points out that it is necessary to administrate the numismatic market.
"People think of coin collections as money, " a member of the Numismatic Club explained.
The American Numismatic Association reports that its membership has declined slightly in recent years from about 32, 000 to 27, 000.
